name: Finnish Curd Cake
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Cake:
1. 1½ teaspoons Baking Powder
2. 1 cup Unbleached Flour (sifted)
3. 1 cup Cottage Cheese
4. 2 Large Eggs
5. ½ cup Brown Sugar
6. 1 teaspoon Cinnamon, Ground
7. 1 teaspoon Cardamom, Ground
8. ½ teaspoon Ginger, Ground
9. 1 teaspoon Orange Rind, Grated
10. 1 teaspoon Lemon Rind, Grated
11. ½ tablespoon Butter (melted)
1. Use Sweet Cream Butter in this recipe.
2. Note: This recipe can vary depending on the type of pan you use.
-----------
- Butter the baking dish, pie pan, or springform pan until generously coated. Sprinkle the crumbs as needed into the pan, then turn the pan around and shake gently, distributing the crumbs along the sides as well. The crumbs should completely coat the inside of the pan. Chill briefly to set the crumbs and then fill with the desired filling.
- Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C). Sift together the flour and baking powder and set aside.
- Press the cottage cheese through a sieve.
- In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs and the sugar until they are frothy. Add the spices and fruit rinds. Add the cottage cheese and blend all the ingredients well. Stir in the butter, then add the dry mixture, mixing well.
- Pour the mixture into the prepared crust and bake for 1 hour.
Note: This is more like a quick bread, and you can increase the sugar if you like as this is not particularly sweet.
